fields.summary: Specifies a design-space coordinate for a variable font axis.
fields.remarks:
<format type="text/markdown"><![CDATA[
## Remarks

`SKFontVariationPositionCoordinate` specifies a single axis and its value in the
design space of a variable font. Use these coordinates with
<xref:SkiaSharp.SKFontArguments.VariationDesignPosition> to select a specific
font variation when cloning a typeface.

This is a value type and does not require disposal.

## Examples

```csharp
var coords = new SKFontVariationPositionCoordinate[]
{
    new SKFontVariationPositionCoordinate
    {
        Axis = SKFourByteTag.Parse("wght"),
        Value = 700f,
    },
};
var args = new SKFontArguments { VariationDesignPosition = coords };
using var typeface = SKTypeface.FromFile("variable.ttf");
using var boldTypeface = typeface.Clone(args);
```
]]></format>

fields.summary: Gets or sets the four-byte tag identifying the variation axis.
fields.value: The <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFourByteTag" /> of the variation axis.
